requirement_topic.en: Local Authorised Importer, Labelling in Uzbek and Russian, and Import Permit
requirement_topic.zh: 当地授权进口商、乌兹别克语及俄语标签以及进口许可
requirement_topic.zht: 當地授權進口商、烏茲別克語及俄語標籤以及進口許可

summary.en: Foreign manufacturers exporting wireless or IoT devices to Uzbekistan must designate a locally registered authorised importer or distributor who holds or co-holds the UzACI conformity certificate and UzStandard conformity documents. The importer bears legal responsibility for compliance, customs clearance, and post-market obligations. Product labels must include information in both Uzbek (O'zbek tili, Latin script) and Russian (as a co-official language widely used in commerce and technical documentation), covering product name, technical specifications, manufacturer name and address, voltage/frequency rating, and applicable conformity mark. Import of radio and telecom terminal equipment may additionally require an import permit or prior notification to the State Customs Committee of Uzbekistan or relevant authorities. EAC mark requirements do NOT apply — Uzbekistan is not a member of the Eurasian Economic Union.
summary.zh: 向乌兹别克斯坦出口无线或物联网设备的外国制造商须指定在当地注册的授权进口商或经销商，该主体须持有或共同持有UzACI合格证书及UzStandard合规文件，并对合规性、清关及售后义务承担法律责任。产品标签须同时包含乌兹别克语（拉丁字母）和俄语（作为商业及技术文件中广泛使用的共同官方语言）信息，涵盖产品名称、技术规格、制造商名称及地址、电压/频率额定值及适用合格标志。无线电及电信终端设备的进口还可能须向乌兹别克斯坦国家海关委员会或相关主管机构取得进口许可或提前告知。EAC标志要求不适用——乌兹别克斯坦非欧亚经济联盟成员。
summary.zht: 向烏茲別克斯坦出口無線或物聯網裝置的外國製造商須指定在當地註冊的授權進口商或經銷商，該主體須持有或共同持有UzACI合格證書及UzStandard合規文件，並對合規性、清關及售後義務承擔法律責任。產品標籤須同時包含烏茲別克語（拉丁字母）和俄語（作為商業及技術文件中廣泛使用的共同官方語言）資訊，涵蓋產品名稱、技術規格、製造商名稱及地址、電壓/頻率額定值及適用合格標誌。無線電及電信終端設備的進口還可能須向烏茲別克斯坦國家海關委員會或相關主管機構取得進口許可或提前告知。EAC標誌要求不適用——烏茲別克斯坦非歐亞經濟聯盟成員。

standards_or_laws: Uzbekistan Law on Telecommunications (2014, as amended) — importer obligations
Uzbekistan Consumer Protection Law — labelling requirements
State Customs Committee of Uzbekistan — import permit procedures for restricted goods
Uzbekistan State Language Law — Uzbek as official language; Russian widely accepted in technical/commercial contexts

summary.en: For the Chinese domestic market, no local agent or importer designation is required from a Chinese manufacturer. CCC certificates and product labelling requirements are in Simplified Chinese (Mandarin). There is no equivalent 'foreign importer agent' obligation within China's domestic compliance framework. The concept is not applicable to Chinese export; it is a target-market (Uzbekistan) requirement.
summary.zh: 对于中国国内市场，中国制造商无需指定当地代理商或进口商。CCC证书及产品标签要求使用简体中文（普通话）。中国国内合规框架中不存在等效的「外国进口代理」义务。该要求不适用于中国出口，为目标市场（乌兹别克斯坦）的要求。
summary.zht: 對於中國國內市場，中國製造商無需指定當地代理商或進口商。CCC證書及產品標籤要求使用簡體中文（普通話）。中國國內合規框架中不存在等效的「外國進口代理」義務。該要求不適用於中國出口，為目標市場（烏茲別克斯坦）的要求。

standards_or_laws: CCC labelling requirements (Simplified Chinese, Chinese standard product marks)
No equivalent local-agent designation requirement in Chinese domestic framework

gap.en: Full gap — no Chinese domestic equivalent. A locally registered Uzbekistan importer or distributor must be designated and must co-hold the conformity certificates. Product labels must be redone in Uzbek (Latin script) and Russian; Chinese-only labels are not compliant. Verify current import permit requirements for radio equipment with the State Customs Committee of Uzbekistan.
gap.zh: 完全差距——中国国内无等效要求。须指定在乌兹别克斯坦当地注册的进口商或经销商，并须共同持有合格证书。产品标签须以乌兹别克语（拉丁字母）和俄语重新制作；仅有中文标签不符合要求。请向乌兹别克斯坦国家海关委员会核验无线电设备的当前进口许可要求。
gap.zht: 完全差距——中國國內無等效要求。須指定在烏茲別克斯坦當地註冊的進口商或經銷商，並須共同持有合格證書。產品標籤須以烏茲別克語（拉丁字母）和俄語重新製作；僅有中文標籤不符合要求。請向烏茲別克斯坦國家海關委員會核驗無線電設備的當前進口許可要求。

source.publisher: State Customs Committee of the Republic of Uzbekistan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A locally registered authorised importer in Uzbekistan is required to hold or co-hold UzACI and UzStandard conformity certificates and bears legal responsibility for imported wireless devices. Product labels must be in Uzbek (Latin script) and Russian. The Russian EAC mark is not required and carries no legal effect in Uzbekistan. Confirm current import permit obligations for radio equipment with the State Customs Committee and UzACI before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 须由乌兹别克斯坦当地注册的授权进口商持有或共同持有UzACI和UzStandard合格证书，并对进口无线设备承担法律责任。产品标签须以乌兹别克语（拉丁字母）和俄语标注。俄罗斯EAC标志在乌兹别克斯坦不需要且不具法律效力。出货前请向国家海关委员会和UzACI确认无线电设备的当前进口许可义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 須由烏茲別克斯坦當地註冊的授權進口商持有或共同持有UzACI和UzStandard合格證書，並對進口無線裝置承擔法律責任。產品標籤須以烏茲別克語（拉丁字母）和俄語標注。俄羅斯EAC標誌在烏茲別克斯坦不需要且不具法律效力。出貨前請向國家海關委員會和UzACI確認無線電設備的當前進口許可義務。
